title: Workspace Cargo.toml with all crate members
description: Create the workspace Cargo.toml at root with member declarations for all crates defined in ./docs/00_project_overview.md section 'Repository Structure'

title: crates/slicer-ir/ — all IR structs
description: Create all IR structs in crates/slicer-ir/ matching ./docs/02_ir_schemas.md exactly

title: Create WIT directory and all WIT files
description: Create wit/ directory with: deps/types.wit, deps/config.wit, deps/ir-types.wit, host-api.wit, world-layer.wit, world-prepass.wit, world-postpass.wit, world-finalization.wit as specified in docs/03_wit_and_manifest.md
